session_label: Ottoman chunk 4 (of 4); Milli Kütüphane Yazma Eserler + Diyanet İşleri Yazma Eserler deep-probe
scope: Deep-probe Milli Kütüphane (Ankara) dijital-kutuphane.mkutup.gov.tr advanced search + /authority/personlist enumeration; Diyanet İşleri yazmaeserler.diyanet.gov.tr title/author search batteries across Cihanşah + Hakîkî + Karakoyunlu + Yusuf Hakîkî + جهانشاه + Cihan Şah variants. WebFetch-only (no Playwright). Verifies whether any NEW Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu / Hakîkî witness surfaces beyond v1.0 register entry ankara_milli_kutuphane_a_5252.
context_note: Follows site-restricted Google sweep in probe_2026-05-11_avenue_provincial_ottoman_sufi_maincontext.json which surfaced these two portals as next-tier deep-probe candidates. The main-context sweep also flagged Diyanet id=931 ([er-Risâle fî esrâri'l-hurûf]) as a v2.0 mecmûʿa-mining lead; captured here in hurufi_text_id_931_v2_followup block.
constraints: No em dashes in JSON (style rule)

portals.portal_name: Milli Kütüphane Dijital Kütüphane Yazma Eserler (Ankara National Library, Manuscripts Division)

reachability.advanced_search_url: REDIRECTS_302_TO_LOGIN at /Account/Login?ReturnUrl=%2Ftr%2Fmanuscripts%2Fcatalog%2Fadvancedsearch; advanced search is behind an authenticated login wall (email + password + Giriş Yap button), with new-account registration link visible. No guest-access option exposed.
reachability.list_endpoint_with_q_param: JS_RENDERED_SPA; static HTML shows only the catalog framework and navigation. Submitting ?q=Cihanşah or ?q=Hakîkî returns the same static skeleton with no results section populated. Real results load dynamically via AJAX after user interaction.
reachability.personlist_authority_endpoint: PAGINATED_SPA; returns 1-50 of 135,824 person entries paginated across 2,717 pages. The ?q= and ?searchTerm= URL parameters do NOT filter the list; both return the same default page 1 alphabetically. Filtering requires JS-driven form submission inside the SPA.
reachability.specific_shelfmark_url: Tried /tr/manuscripts/catalog/list/A%205252; returns the same static catalog-list framework, not a specific record detail page. Direct shelfmark deep-link via URL not supported.

queries_executed.outcome: Advanced search inaccessible without authenticated session; login-walled.
No static results returned; JS rendering required.
No static results returned; JS rendering required.
q= filter not honored by URL parameter; SPA-only filtering.
q= filter not honored by URL parameter; SPA-only filtering.

queries_executed.result_count: Page 1 default listing; searchTerm= also ignored
queries_executed.outcome: Confirmed alternate parameter name also not honored. SPA-only filtering.
Direct shelfmark deep-link not supported via URL path; requires SPA interaction.

portals.v1_register_overlap_note: Witness ankara_milli_kutuphane_a_5252 (shelfmark A 5252, 204-folio mecmua with Cihānşāh poetry at ff. 183a-196a) was originally surfaced via Islamisation DB (islam-anatolia.ac.uk TK_Mil_A_5252 slug), NOT via direct Milli Kütüphane portal interaction. The current WebFetch-only probe confirms that the Milli Kütüphane public-facing catalogue is JS-SPA and that direct portal verification of A 5252 metadata would require a Playwright headed-browser session or authenticated advanced-search login. The Islamisation DB remains the canonical surfacing channel for this witness.
portals.verdict: PROBED_INACCESSIBLE_VIA_WEBFETCH; advanced search login-walled, list endpoint and authority personlist endpoint are JS-SPA without URL-parameter filtering. No NEW Cihanşah witness beyond v1.0 A 5252 can be confirmed or excluded via WebFetch-only methodology. Residual gap: Playwright headed-browser pass on advanced-search login + SPA-driven personlist filtering.
residual_gaps_for_playwright_pass: Authenticated login at /Account/Login then advanced search across Eser Adı = Hakîkî / Yazar = Cihanşah / Yazar = Karakoyunlu / Yazar = Yusuf Hakîkî
SPA-driven personlist filter q=Cihanşah / q=Hakîkî / q=Karakoyunlu to enumerate authority records
SPA-driven A 5252 deep-link to capture full bibliographic record

portals.portal_name: Diyanet İşleri Başkanlığı Kütüphanesi Yazma Eserler

reachability.search_endpoint: REACHABLE; GET form with field= and query= URL parameters returns static HTML result lists indexable by WebFetch.
reachability.detail_endpoint: PARTIALLY_REACHABLE; detail pages return HTML with title (Turkish + Arabic script) but most extended bibliographic fields (author, copyist, date, shelfmark, dimensions, foliation, paper, script, binding, decoration, contents) render via JS/encoded image data and are NOT extractable via WebFetch.

results.title: er-Risâletü'l-hâkāniyye fî tahkīk-i mebahasi'l-'ilm
results.subject: philosophy/logic; ilm treatise; NOT Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu Dīvān

queries_executed.outcome: Seven jurisprudence/logic/literary-puzzle works whose titles or dedicatory frames include the phrase 'Cihan Şah' as compound title element or dedicatee, NOT the Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu sultan-poet's Dīvān/Külliyât. Sampled id=6508 detail page confirmed no Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu / Hakîkî / Karakoyunlu reference. These are FALSE POSITIVES per the Yusuf Hakîkî homonym treatment framework; generic 'Cihan Şah' as 'king of the world' honorific or unrelated patron Cihanşah.

Two Ottoman ethics/Sufi literature texts; neither is a Hakîkî Divan witness. The Münşeât is associated with Kınalızade Ali Çelebi (d. 979/1572, Ottoman moralist), and Gülşen-i takva is an Ottoman Sufi-ethical text. Sampling detail pages confirms no Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu reference. The 'Hakîkî' index match is likely metadata-level (author or subject keyword), possibly Yusuf Hakîkî Bursavi adjacency, NOT the Qaraqoyunlu Hakîkî.
Same two records as author-query: id=15556 Münşeât-ü Kınalızâde + id=19803 Gülşen-i takva. Confirms full Hakîkî index surface.
Zero matches for the dynasty name.
Zero matches for Yusuf Hakîkî Bursavi (the homonym poet).
Zero matches for the Arabic-script form.

portals.verdict: PROBED_NEGATIVE; zero Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu / Hakîkî witness across all variant queries. Two Hakîkî-tagged records (id=15556, id=19803) are confirmed false positives (Ottoman ethics texts, no Cihanşah reference). Seven 'Cihan Şah' compound-title hits are jurisprudence/logic texts with the phrase 'Cihan Şah' as part of compound title or honorific dedicatory frame, NOT the sultan-poet's Dīvān. Diyanet catalogue contains NO Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu witness.
portals.false_positive_pattern_extracted: Diyanet catalogue indexes the literal phrase 'Cihan Şah' from work titles like 'er-Risâletü'l-hâkāniyye' (treatise dedicated to a 'cihan şah' = king of the world) and 'Dav'ü's-sirâc' (containing 'cihan' in titulature). These match the 7-result hit pattern under field=author when search treats compound-title elements as author-adjacent. Per v1.0 false-positive framework, the lack of Qaraqoyunlu/Karakoyunlu dynasty markers and the jurisprudential/logical subject matter rule out all 7 as Cihanşah Qaraqoyunlu witnesses.

hurufi_text_id_931_v2_followup.purpose: v2.0 mecmûʿa-mining lead: Diyanet record [er-Risâle fî esrâri'l-hurûf] (id=931) is a Hurufi treatise that, per v1.0 mecmûʿa-Nesîmî-adjacency heuristic, sits adjacent to where Cihanşah Hakîkî witnesses appear (Ankara MK A 5252 mecmua co-locates Hakîkî with Nesîmî + Yûnus Emre Hurufi-adjacent content; Konya Hacı Bektaş BY0000010729 alphabetical Hakîkî entry sits in a Hurufi-themed mecmua). Diyanet's Hurufi text holdings are therefore a v2.0 surface worth dedicated mecmûʿa-mining probe to identify potential anthologies that co-locate Hurufi texts with Cihanşah/Hakîkî poetry.

captured_metadata.title_translation: Epistle on the Secrets of Letters
captured_metadata.host_library: Diyanet İşleri Başkanlığı Kütüphanesi (Presidency of Religious Affairs Library, Ankara)
captured_metadata.subject_inferred: Hurufi mystical letter-symbolism; treatise on esoteric interpretation of alphabetic and numerical symbols within Islamic mysticism (Hurufiyya doctrine cluster)
captured_metadata.extended_fields_status: NOT_EXTRACTABLE_VIA_WEBFETCH; detail page renders most bibliographic fields (author, copyist, date, shelfmark/dosya no., dimensions, foliation count, paper, script, binding, decoration, contents, provenance, incipit, subject categories) via JS-encoded image data not parseable as text. Author and date critical for Cihanşah-adjacency assessment are NOT recoverable from current WebFetch session.

v2_recommended_followup_actions: Playwright headed-browser pass on https://yazmaeserler.diyanet.gov.tr/details?id=931&materialType=YE to capture full bibliographic record including author/copyist/date/shelfmark/contents; verify whether this is a known Hurufi text by Fadlallah Astarabadi, Mahmud Pasi, Nesîmî, or anonymous mecmua entry.
Once author/date captured, assess whether the codex is a SINGLE-WORK Hurufi treatise OR a mecmua co-locating Hurufi texts with poetry (the latter being the Cihanşah/Hakîkî-adjacent surface).
If mecmua, request full table-of-contents capture to check for any Hakîkî/Cihanşah ghazal entries.

Broaden Hurufi-text mining: re-query Diyanet for title queries Hurûf / Hurufiyye / Esrâr-ı hurûf / Câvidânnâme / Fadlullah / Astarâbâdî to enumerate full Hurufi-text holdings, then triage for mecmua structure.
hurufi_text_id_931_v2_followup.scope_disclaimer: id=931 is NOT a Cihanşah witness candidate. It is a v2.0 followup surface for mecmûʿa-mining and Hurufi-cluster heuristic application. Including in this probe output for the chunk 4 deliverable list; does NOT affect v1.0 register.

summary.v1_register_impact: ZERO new witnesses. Milli Kütüphane A 5252 already in v1.0 register (witness_id ankara_milli_kutuphane_a_5252, surfaced via Islamisation DB); WebFetch-only probe cannot independently verify nor exclude additional Milli Kütüphane witnesses due to login-walled advanced search and JS-SPA list endpoint. Diyanet PROBED_NEGATIVE for direct Cihanşah witness across all variant queries.
summary.v2_followup_captured: Diyanet Hurufi text id=931 metadata captured at title-level; deep bibliographic capture requires Playwright pass.
residual_gaps: Milli Kütüphane advanced search Playwright pass with authenticated login (.env credentials not currently scoped to Milli Kütüphane portal; would require manual account creation per the registration link visible at /Account/Login)
Milli Kütüphane personlist SPA-driven Cihanşah/Hakîkî/Karakoyunlu filter via Playwright
Milli Kütüphane A 5252 direct shelfmark deep-link via SPA to capture full bibliographic record beyond what Islamisation DB surfaced
Diyanet detail-page JS rendering of full bibliographic fields for id=931 (Hurufi v2.0 followup) and any other Hurufi-text mecmua candidates
Broader Diyanet Hurufi-text query battery (Hurûf, Câvidânnâme, Fadlullah, Astarâbâdî, etc.) for v2.0 mecmûʿa-mining
methodological_findings: WebFetch is reliable for portals that expose static HTML search results from GET parameters (Diyanet); ineffective for portals that login-wall advanced search and JS-SPA list/personlist endpoints (Milli Kütüphane).

Diyanet 7-result 'Cihan Şah' compound-title false-positive class is now formalized: jurisprudence/logic texts dedicated to or titled with 'Cihan Şah' as compound title element / honorific dedicatory frame. The pattern matches v1.0 Yusuf Hakîkî Bursavi homonym risk in spirit (different king-poet/named dedicatee with similar phrase), and supports the v1.0 disambiguation criterion: confirm Qaraqoyunlu dynastic context + Persian-Turkic poetry content before accepting any 'Cihan Şah' index hit.

Diyanet Hurufi text id=931 confirms the heuristic that Anatolian/Ottoman Hurufi text holdings are a candidate mecmûʿa-mining surface; this is consistent with the v1.0 Ankara MK A 5252 + Konya HB BY0000010729 surfacing path (Hurufi-adjacent mecmua contexts yielding Hakîkî poetry).
